channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Kotlin for Backend
item.description: Learn Kotlin for backend development & boost your skills.

item.title: Git Pro Tips
item.description: Boost Git skills with expert tips and tricks for advanced version control.

item.title: Boost CLI Productivity
item.description: Boost CLI productivity with expert tips and tricks.

item.title: Code Less, Create More
item.description: Unlock efficiency with low-code/no-code platforms. Build faster, create more.

item.title: Crack Sys Design
item.description: Master system design interviews with expert tips and tricks.

item.title: AI Agents
item.description: Unlock AI potential with expert agent development insights.

item.title: Scale Smart
item.description: Boost performance with database replication & sharding strategies.

item.title: Secure Code: SAST/DAST
item.description: Boost app security with SAST & DAST testing. Learn how to protect your code.

item.title: Code Your Brand
item.description: Establish a strong online presence with personal branding tips for developers.

item.title: RPA Revolved
item.description: Unlock efficiency with RPA. Discover automation secrets

item.title: Rails Web Apps
item.description: Build scalable web apps with Ruby on Rails. Learn expert tips and best practices.

item.title: Flutter App Dev
item.description: Build fast, natively compiled apps with Flutter. Learn expert dev techniques.

item.title: Quantum 101
item.description: Unlock Quantum Computing basics & discover the future of tech in our introductory guide.

item.title: Func Prog 101
item.description: Learn the basics of functional programming concepts and principles in this introductory guide.

item.title: Engineer Time Hacks
item.description: Boost productivity with time-saving tips tailored for engineers.

item.title: Mesh Up
item.description: Learn about Service Mesh Architecture and its benefits in our 'Mesh Up' blog post.

item.title: Doc Right
item.description: Learn documentation best practices with Doc Right. Improve clarity, accuracy, and efficiency in your docs.

item.title: Build with Web Components
item.description: Learn to build reusable UI with Web Components & Custom Elements.

item.title: ML Anomaly Detection
item.description: Detect unusual patterns with ML anomaly detection. Learn how machine learning identifies outliers.

item.title: Crack Tech Interviews
item.description: Ace tech interviews with our expert guide. Learn tips, tricks, and strategies.
